name: outreach-review-notify
description: Finds drafted outreach items needing human review and posts Slack notifications with quick-action buttons. T27 adds approval form triggers; T29 wires the approve/reject buttons. TODO(phase2): migrate notification log from outcomes to a dedicated notifications table. NOTE: Slack channel C0B4SUTP8R4 (#plotlens-outreach) is hardcoded because n8n 2.9.4 blocks $env access in node expressions (N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE default). To change the channel, update the Slack Notify node's channelId.value directly.

parameters.query:
SELECT oi.id AS outreach_item_id, oi.source_url, oi.source_platform,
       d.id AS preview_draft_id, d.draft_text AS preview_text, d.risk_score AS preview_risk_score
FROM outreach_items oi
JOIN drafts d ON d.outreach_item_id = oi.id AND d.variant = 'helpful_only'
WHERE oi.status='drafted'
  AND d.status='needs_human_review'
  AND oi.id NOT IN (
    SELECT (notes::jsonb->>'outreach_item_id')::bigint
    FROM outcomes
    WHERE notes::jsonb ? 'outreach_item_id' AND notes::jsonb->>'kind' = 'notified'
  )
ORDER BY oi.discovered_at
LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO outcomes (publish_job_id, notes)
VALUES (NULL, jsonb_build_object('outreach_item_id', $1::bigint, 'kind', 'notified')::text);
